qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated public flow execution leads to arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code path and root cause: this finding concerns unauthenticated execution of PUBLIC flows through src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/chat.py and dangerous flow components, not the monitor.py endpoints missing get_current_active_user dependencies.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated webhook flow execution leads to arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code path and root cause: this finding concerns webhook execution through endpoints.py/get_webhook_user with WEBHOOK_AUTH_ENABLE=false and dangerous flow components, not the monitor.py endpoints missing get_current_active_user dependencies.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: missing authentication dependencies on GET /api/v1/monitor/messages, GET /api/v1/monitor/transactions, and DELETE /api/v1/monitor/messages/session/{session_id} in src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/monitor.py. The qualifying findings are separate unauthenticated flow-execution/RCE issues on chat and webhook endpoints.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-c5cp-vx83-jhqx names src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/monitor.py and three monitor endpoints missing dependencies=[Depends(get_current_active_user)].
public_flow_execution reports POST /api/v1/chat/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow in chat.py plus PythonREPL/PythonCodeStructuredTool execution, with no monitor.py endpoint evidence.
webhook_auth_bypass reports POST /api/v1/webhook/{flow_id_or_name} in endpoints.py/get_webhook_user with WEBHOOK_AUTH_ENABLE=false, with no monitor.py endpoint evidence.
